overall.description: Bus simulator gameplay showing first-person driving perspective from the driver's cabin during a heavy rainstorm. The bus navigates through urban streets, gets stuck behind a large truck, and eventually stops at a red traffic light. Windshield wipers are active throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban street during heavy rainstorm

agents.ego_description: driving bus through heavy rain with windshield wipers active, approaching slower traffic ahead

entered.detail: interior dashboard with Scania logo and instrument panel visible throughout the clip
digital GPS navigation display showing route information and map
windshield wipers moving rapidly to clear heavy rain from the front glass
large white box truck driving ahead in the same lane
modern commercial buildings with storefronts and glass facades lining the right side of the street
line of green trees along the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from the bus driver's seat during a heavy downpour. The windshield wipers sweep rapidly as the bus drives down a multi-lane city street lined with commercial buildings on the right and trees on the left. A large white box truck is visible ahead in the distance, and the GPS screen displays route information on the right side of the dashboard.

events.description: bus slows down and stops behind large white box truck due to traffic congestion
white truck fills most of the windshield view, severely limiting forward visibility

agents.ego_description: stopped or crawling at very low speed directly behind the white box truck

segments.scene_description: The bus rapidly approaches and comes to a stop directly behind the large white box truck, which now dominates the center of the windshield view. The vehicle is forced to slow to a crawl or complete stop due to traffic conditions. The trees on the left recede from view as the bus focuses on the truck ahead.

events.description: bus accelerates and steers left to overtake or move past the stopped truck

agents.ego_description: accelerating and moving past the white truck, resuming normal driving speed

entered.detail: red car visible on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The bus accelerates and maneuvers to the left, finally passing the large white truck that was blocking the lane. As the bus moves forward, the truck recedes behind the vehicle, and the view opens up to show more of the street ahead with oncoming traffic and parked cars visible along the right curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with mixed traffic

agents.ego_description: cruising down the wet city street at steady speed, passing parked cars and navigating through moderate traffic

entered.detail: bright yellow car parked on the right side of the street
row of various cars parked along the right curb

segments.scene_description: The bus continues driving steadily down the multi-lane urban street, with commercial buildings passing by on the right and a denser line of trees now visible closer on the left. Various parked cars including a distinctive yellow vehicle line the right curb, while oncoming traffic approaches from the opposite direction through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection stopped at red traffic light

events.description: bus approaches red traffic light and stops behind white car at intersection
bus comes to complete stop at traffic light, waiting for signal to change

agents.ego_description: stopped at red traffic light behind a white car, with an orange car visible in the lane to the right

notable_agents.action: white sedan stopped ahead at the red traffic light

entered.detail: traffic light hanging over intersection showing red signal
white sedan stopped ahead at the traffic light
orange sedan stopped in the lane to the right at the traffic light

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches an intersection and slows to a stop at a red traffic light. A white car is stopped directly ahead, and an orange car is visible in the adjacent lane to the right. The traffic light hangs overhead showing red, while rain continues to fall and windshield wipers maintain their steady rhythm. The trees on the left fade from view as the bus waits at the signal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's cabin as it navigates a rain-slicked urban street and eventually comes to a halt at a traffic signal. It begins with the bus driving through a heavy downpour past commercial buildings and trees, with windshield wipers sweeping rapidly as a large white box truck appears in the distance. As the bus closes the gap and comes to a stop behind the truck, the view becomes dominated by the vehicle's rear before the bus accelerates and maneuvers to the left to pass it. The scene then opens up to reveal a wider stretch of the multi-lane street lined with parked cars, including a distinctive yellow vehicle, and oncoming traffic moving through the rain. Finally, the bus slows to a stop at a red traffic light at an intersection, coming to a rest behind a white car with an orange car idling in the adjacent lane.
